prompt:
I need to implement a user registration feature for my Spring Boot application. The business requirements are:

1. Users must register with email and password
2. Email must be valid and unique
3. Password must be at least 8 characters with at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number
4. After successful registration, send a welcome email
5. If email already exists, return an error

Help me write tests and implement this following ATDD principles.

assertions.name: defines_acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Defines acceptance criteria using [+] and [-] format

assertions.name: uses_arrange_act_assert
assertions.description: Tests follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with clear comments

assertions.name: uses_assertj_fluent
assertions.description: Uses AssertJ fluent assertions (assertThat) instead of JUnit assertions

assertions.name: behavior_focused_naming
assertions.description: Test method names follow method_scenario_expectedResult pattern

assertions.name: covers_positive_and_negative
assertions.description: Tests cover both positive (happy path) and negative (error) scenarios
